# Driver Earnings Payouts

> Track driver earnings per trip, manage payout schedules, and process driver compensation

**Category:** Payment · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** fleet · driver · earnings · payouts · compensation · settlement

## What this does

Track driver earnings per trip, manage payout schedules, and process driver compensation

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **earning_id** *(text, required)* — Earning ID
- **driver_uuid** *(text, required)* — Driver
- **order_uuid** *(text, optional)* — Order
- **amount** *(number, required)* — Gross Amount (minor units)
- **deductions** *(number, optional)* — Deductions (minor units)
- **net_amount** *(number, optional)* — Net Amount (minor units)
- **currency** *(text, required)* — Currency (ISO 4217)
- **earning_type** *(select, required)* — Earning Type
- **payout_uuid** *(text, optional)* — Payout Batch
- **payout_method** *(select, optional)* — Payout Method
- **payout_reference** *(text, optional)* — Payout Reference
- **period_start** *(date, optional)* — Period Start
- **period_end** *(date, optional)* — Period End
- **status** *(select, required)* — Status

## What must be true

- **auto_create_on_completion:** Earnings are created automatically when an order is completed
- **configurable_commission:** The platform commission percentage is configurable per organization and driver tier
- **net_calculation:** Net amount is calculated as gross amount minus all applicable deductions
- **minor_currency_units:** All monetary values are stored in minor currency units
- **driver_earnings_visibility:** Drivers can view their earnings history and pending payout balance
- **batch_payouts:** Payouts are batched by configurable period (daily, weekly, or on-demand)
- **retry_failed:** Failed payouts must be retried or escalated to manual review
- **reverse_on_cancellation:** Earnings linked to cancelled or failed orders are automatically reversed
- **processor_reference:** Payout records must reference the external transaction ID from the payment processor
- **access_control:** Driver earnings are never accessible to other drivers or unauthorized parties

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Earning Created** — when order.completed event received; driver_uuid exists, then Trip earning record created for driver.
- **Earning Reversed On Cancellation** — when order.cancelled event received after earning was created, then Earning reversed due to order cancellation.
- **Earning Approved** — when status eq "pending", then Earning approved and added to next payout batch.
- **Payout Processed** — when payout period end date reached or on-demand triggered; approved earnings exist for driver, then Driver payout processed and funds transferred.

**❌ Failure paths**

- **Payout Failed** — when payment processor returns failure during payout, then Payout failed; requires manual review. *(error: `EARNINGS_PAYOUT_FAILED`)*

## Errors it can return

- `EARNINGS_PAYOUT_FAILED` — Your payout could not be processed. Please check your bank details.
- `EARNINGS_INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE` — Payout amount is below the minimum threshold.
- `EARNINGS_INVALID_BANK_DETAILS` — Payout failed — invalid bank account details.

## Connects to

- **order-lifecycle** *(required)* — Earnings are triggered by order completion
- **trip-billing-invoicing** *(required)* — Trip revenue is the basis for driver earnings
- **driver-profile** *(required)* — Earnings are attributed to a specific driver
